compiled_state.title: test-run-all.sh fails: missing --python-runner mock for 4th suite
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: added missing --python-runner mock to all 6 tests in test-run-all.sh — 4th suite (Python) was added to run-all.sh but tests were not updated with the mock
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
